prompt_inputs.goal: optimize performance for marathon training with high carbohydrate intake and strategic meal timing around 2-hour morning run

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers full day with breakfast, pre-run fuel, post-run recovery meal, lunch, snacks, and dinner
Includes high carbohydrate content (approximately 8-10g per kg body weight) appropriate for endurance athlete
Specifies meal timing around the training session with pre-run and post-run nutrition strategy
Plan is compact and concise (suitable for single-page reference)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-intensity endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high carbohydrate intake and specific timing around training sessions

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one full day with specific times and portions
Provides high protein intake suitable for strength/power athlete (minimum 1.6g per kg bodyweight)
All meals are vegetarian with plant-based or dairy protein sources
Includes key micronutrients for weightlifters (iron, zinc, B12, magnesium)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) with dietary restrictions (vegetarian) requiring high protein alternatives and specific micronutrient considerations
